parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.MAIL_FROM, name: "WGC Monitor" }, to: [{ email: $env.ALERT_EMAIL }], subject: "[WGC ALERT] workflow error: " + ($json.workflow && $json.workflow.name || "unknown"), textContent: "Workflow " + ($json.workflow && $json.workflow.name || "unknown") + " failed.

" + "Error: " + ($json.execution && $json.execution.error && $json.execution.error.message || "n/a") + "
" + "Node: " + ($json.execution && $json.execution.lastNodeExecuted || "n/a") + "
" + "Execution: " + ($json.execution && $json.execution.url || "n/a") + "

" + "If this is WF-2, a lead may be undelivered - check the execution now." }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.MAIL_FROM, name: "WGC Monitor" }, to: [{ email: $env.ALERT_EMAIL }], subject: "[WGC ALERT] zero submissions today - form may be silently broken", textContent: "No form submissions recorded since 00:00 on " + $json.day + " (bot rejects: " + $json.bots + ").\n\nRun the smoke test: submit the form and confirm a WF-1 execution appears." }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ sender: { email: $env.MAIL_FROM, name: "WGC Monitor" }, to: [{ email: $env.ALERT_EMAIL }], subject: "[WGC] weekly conversion log (instrument I1)", textContent: $json.report }) }}
